zh.lifeSummary: 當John Maddox Lord of Llanfrynach於1572年1月29日出生在英國維爾爾塞頓 維尼時，他的父親Thomas Maddox Lord of Llanfrynach22歲，母親Margarette Morgan22歲。他於1590年與Lady Elizabeth Aubrey在英國爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1639年4月23日之前在英國倫敦，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦斯特普尼聖 登斯坦 安德 哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Maddox Lord of Llanfrynach于1572年1月29日出生在英国維爾爾塞頓 維尼时，他的父亲Thomas Maddox Lord of Llanfrynach22岁，母亲Margarette Morgan22岁。他于1590年与Lady Elizabeth Aubrey在英国爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1639年4月23日之前在英国倫敦，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦斯特普尼聖 登斯坦 安德 哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Maddox
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Welsh origin): from the Welsh personal name Madog (see Maddock ). Variant of Maddocks .

variants.name: Mattix
meanings: English (of Welsh origin): variant of   Maddox  .

variants.name: Maddock
meanings: English (of Welsh origin): from the Welsh personal name Madawc, Madog, from the ancestor of Welsh madog ‘goodly’. As a personal name and surname it was quite common in medieval Wales, in English counties bordering Wales, and in late medieval West Cornwall.

variants.name: Maddix
meanings: English (of Welsh origin): variant of   Maddox  .

meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When John Maddox Lord of Llanfrynach was born on 29 January 1572, in Sutton Veny, Wiltshire, England, his father, Thomas Maddox Lord of Llanfrynach, was 22 and his mother, Margarette Morgan, was 22. He married Lady Elizabeth Aubrey in 1590, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died before 23 April 1639, in London, England, and was buried in Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Maddox Lord of Llanfrynach est né le 29 janvier 1572, à Sutton Veny, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Maddox Lord of Llanfrynach, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margarette Morgan, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Aubrey en 1590, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé avant 23 avril 1639, à Londres, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Maddox Lord of Llanfrynach am 29. Januar 1572 in Sutton Veny, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Maddox Lord of Llanfrynach 22 und seine Mutter Margarette Morgan 22. Er hat 1590 in Cheshire, England Lady Elizabeth Aubrey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb vor 23. April 1639 in London, England und wurde in Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Maddox Lord of Llanfrynach è nato il il 29 gennaio 1572 nel Sutton Veny, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Maddox Lord of Llanfrynach, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Margarette Morgan, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Aubrey nel 1590, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì prima del 23 aprile 1639, nel London, England, e fu sepolto a Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Maddox Lord of Llanfrynachが1572年1月29日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアスットオン ベニーで生まれた時，父Thomas Maddox Lord of Llanfrynachは22歳，母Margarette Morganは22歳であった。1590年にイギリスチェシュアイアでLady Elizabeth Aubreyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1639年4月23日以前にイギリスロンドンで死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンステプニーサイント ダンスタン アンド アル サインツ チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Maddox Lord of Llanfrynach(이)가 1572년 1월 29일 영국 윌츠히르 수턴 베니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Maddox Lord of Llanfrynach(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margarette Morgan(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1590년 영국 체실르에서 Lady Elizabeth Aubrey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1639년 4월 23일 이전 영국 런던에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스테p니 세인트 던스탠 앤드 앨 세인츠 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Maddox Lord of Llanfrynach nasceu em 29 de janeiro de 1572, em Sutton Veny, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Maddox Lord of Llanfrynach, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margarette Morgan, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Aubrey em 1590, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 23 de abril de 1639, em London, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Maddox Lord of Llanfrynach родился 29 января 1572 г. в местности суттон вени, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Maddox Lord of Llanfrynach было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margarette Morgan, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Aubrey в 1590 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер перед 23 апрель 1639 г. в местности Лондон, Англия и был похоронен в местности сеинт дунстань анд алл сеинц чурч, степни, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
